summary: Completed testing of Church Navigator fixes: Homepage 4 sections, Admin filters, Bulk delete, Feature button, User names. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification confirmed all features working.

issues: Some church images show 'Ruthvik Church' alt text indicating broken image URLs (likely the /uploads routing issue from iteration 1)

critical_code_review_comments: All P0 features working correctly: Homepage endpoints, Bulk delete, Feature button
Admin filters correctly ignore 'all' value for role/status/denomination
User names display properly in AdminUsers.js table (first_name + last_name)
Previous iteration issue: /uploads static files still route to frontend instead of backend (infrastructure)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and verified working: 1) Homepage shows 4 sections (Featured Churches, Open Churches, Featured Pastors, New Pastors) using dedicated API endpoints. 2) Admin bulk delete works via POST /api/admin/churches/bulk?action=delete. 3) Feature button works via PUT /api/admin/feature/church/{id}. 4) Admin filters ignore 'all' values correctly. 5) User names display in admin table. Previous /uploads static file routing issue still exists from iteration 1.

homepage_sections.featured_churches: Working - shows 2 featured churches (London City Christ Temple, Ruthvik Church)
homepage_sections.open_churches: Working - shows message when no churches open
homepage_sections.featured_pastors: Working - shows 2 featured pastors (Rev Bharath Swamy, Ruthvik Pastor)

admin_bulk_actions.delete_all: Working - button appears when churches selected

admin_feature_button.unfeature_church: Working - shows 'Remove Featured' for featured churches

admin_user_names.display: Working - shows first_name + last_name in table
admin_user_names.fallback: Working - shows 'No name' when names not set
